overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a character walking through Night City at night. The journey traverses a covered pedestrian bridge, open corporate plazas, an intensely neon-lit corridor, and concludes at a street emergency scene with a Trauma Team vehicle.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian bridge with arched tunnel structure

events.description: approaching stairs at end of covered bridge leading down to plaza

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered pedestrian bridge with teal and orange arches

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking ahead in the same direction

entered.detail: teal and orange arched tunnel structure with transparent roof panels
teal colored safety railing with orange trim along walkway edges
illuminated advertisement screen showing commercial content on left wall

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a covered pedestrian bridge with distinctive teal and orange arches. Digital billboards illuminate the left wall while other pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The segment ends as the character approaches stairs leading down from the bridge.

scene_state.functional_zone: open corporate plaza with palm trees and food vendors

events.description: exits covered bridge and descends stairs into open Corpo Plaza
finishes descending stairs and continues walking on flat plaza surface

agents.ego_description: descending stairs from the bridge and walking through the open plaza area

notable_agents.action: vendor standing at food cart with colorful red and blue umbrella

entered.detail: open paved pedestrian plaza with large concrete tiles
tall palm trees in rectangular planters near buildings
food cart with illuminated display and colorful umbrella

segments.scene_description: The character exits the covered bridge and descends into an open corporate plaza. Palm trees and modern buildings surround the area. The character passes a food vendor cart with a colorful umbrella before approaching a narrow passage leading to a neon-lit corridor.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian corridor with intense pink neon lighting

events.description: enters corridor with intense pink and red neon strip lighting overhead and along walls

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow corridor illuminated by intense pink neon lights

entered.detail: intense pink and red neon light strips running along ceiling and wall edges
large illuminated digital advertisement screen showing animated content

segments.scene_description: The character enters a narrow covered corridor bathed in intense pink neon light. Digital advertisements cover the walls while other pedestrians walk ahead. The atmosphere shifts dramatically from the open plaza to this enclosed, vividly lit passageway.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street with emergency medical response scene

events.description: exits neon corridor onto open street revealing Trauma Team emergency vehicle
approaching Trauma Team vehicle with active emergency lights and personnel
passing the emergency scene and continuing down the neon-lit street

agents.ego_description: walking past the emergency medical scene observing the Trauma Team paramedics at work

notable_agents.action: Trauma Team paramedic in white armor standing guard near the vehicle
paramedic kneeling beside victim on ground providing medical assistance

entered.detail: large white futuristic flying ambulance with red emergency lights and TRAUMA TEAM markings
tall buildings covered with bright neon advertisements creating an urban canyon
flashing red warning lights surrounding the Trauma Team vehicle

segments.scene_description: The character exits the neon corridor onto a wide downtown street where a Trauma Team emergency vehicle is parked with lights flashing. Paramedics attend to a victim on the ground as the character walks past the scene. The street continues through a canyon of towering buildings covered in bright neon signage.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban landscape that shifts from a structured pedestrian bridge into a vivid neon corridor and finally onto a chaotic city street. It begins within a covered bridge characterized by teal and orange arches and glowing digital billboards, moving steadily toward a set of descending stairs. As the character exits the bridge, the environment opens into a corporate plaza filled with palm trees and modern architecture, passing a colorful food vendor cart before narrowing into a passage. The scene then shifts dramatically as the camera enters a confined corridor bathed in intense pink neon light and dense digital advertisements. Finally, the camera emerges from the neon glow onto a wide downtown street, passing a flashing Trauma Team emergency vehicle and paramedics attending to a victim amidst a canyon of towering, neon-clad buildings.
